title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services for both adults and children. Services include individual and group therapy, mental health assessment, case management with other service providers, and medication management when necessary. 550 West Sperry Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 676-9161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 676-9161 Main phone Main phone (541) 676-9161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one will be denied care due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Early Intervention for Mental Illness Group Counseling In Person Crisis Intervention Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - OREGON WARMLINE / LINEA DE ESPERANZA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNTY CRISIS LINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
